answer: Klaviyo offers a permanent free tier that includes access to developer APIs [1][2]. There are no specific platform or API usage fees, meaning you can integrate and test for free [3]. You can self-serve by signing up for an account on the Klaviyo website without requiring a sales call [2]. To begin, you can create a test account, generate sample data, and authenticate requests using either public keys for client-side APIs or private keys and OAuth for server-side APIs [3][4][5].
